channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose branches - danger, 28th April
item.description:
Very large heavy branches which are detached from tree but are resting on other thin branches seen on several trees above the walk path. Please remove loose branches so they don’t fall onto people. On the walk path there are several very large trees two of which have two huge loose braches hovering over walk path. Photos attached. Second half of the walkway just after the half way break going up towards princes plain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Oaks, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daffodils have not returned, 28th April
item.description:
Hi - Between Onega Gate bus stop and Shipwright Road bus stop we used to have swathes of daffodils. As I reported in 2024 they were prematurely cut whilst in full bloom and sadly they have not returned. Below Brunswick Quay bus stop they flourish as expected but we have none where there used to be so many ! Please plant some new ones - they are so lovely - we would really appreciate them. Thank you. Best regards - Maki
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redriff Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can pavement/edge of tree pit be inspected at 30 Rochester Ave?, 28th April
item.description:
Please fix this tree pit/paving edge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please inspect pavement and tree pit outside 25 Palace View, 28th April
item.description:
Please look at this tree pit and smooth off with tarmac or redraw/extend tree pit please as it is a trip hazard. Many thanks in advance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household and office material fly tipped, 28th April
item.description:
More rubbish dumped on verges/pavement in Thamesmead. This is an ongoing problem, often with dangerous or risky material

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pointer Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road is filthy, 28th April
item.description:
Between St. Paul's Academy and Sewell road, there's a lot of dirty dumped into the bush. The council doesn't maintain the hedge. It's unlivable.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 27th April
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish (including a mouldy mattress) has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Fridge-Freezer Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
An unwanted fridge-freezer has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 80. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish and Unwanted Heater Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish and an unwanted heater have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 106. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Fencing Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
A pile of unwanted fencing has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th April
item.description:
An item of broken furniture(?) has been left dumped on the turfed area (behind an abandoned Blue-Top wheelie bin). Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Items of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Multiple items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 75/75a. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped and Large Tree Branch Obstructing Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on the pavement and a large tree branch is obstructing the pavement. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Carpet Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
A large length of unwanted carpet has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 27th April
item.description:
There are food packaging, plastic bottles, plastic food containers, cans and food waste on the pavement and road on Tabard Street. It has been there two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Lime bike on middle of pavement

item.title: Lime bikes parked outside designated area, 27th April
item.description:

item.title: Fly tipped black bags of used clothes, 27th April
item.description:
This bag has now been here for a week.
